div.div:
Install Dependencies
run ensure_deps.py
isolated .eval-venv/
uv or pip install

div.div:
Preflight Checks
check_env.py --fix
verify venv, packages
auto-fix what it can

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 210px; height: 1px; padding-top: 409px; margin-left: 411px;

div.div:
check_env.py
[+] python 3.11+
[+] pyyaml >= 6.0
[+] mlflow >= 3.5
[+] agent_eval symlink
[+] anthropic (optional)
[+] api_keys set
[+] mlflow reachable
[+] directories present
[+] eval_config valid
